title: Hoarding Is Driving Energy Prices Higher Everywhere
summary: As wealthy nations scramble to secure stocks of oil, the result is higher prices for all and shortages in vulnerable countries.

title: What Was the 2015 Iran Nuclear Deal?

summary: Gov. Greg Abbott gave the leaders of Houston, Dallas and Austin until Wednesday to amend their policies to his liking, or return over $150 million in police funding.
